message:
feat(fsqlite-btree): implement n-ary split for root node overflow

Replace binary root split with parameterized n-way splitting supporting up
to 8 children. Improves cell distribution safety through multi-point divider
selection with range-based segment boundaries and page capacity constraints.
Maintains correctness invariants for all split configurations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
